augments.name: Brutality
augments.description: Your physical strikes hit 15% harder.

augments.description: Your spells deal 15% more damage.

augments.name: Toughness
augments.description: Gain 12% maximum health.

augments.name: Keen Eye
augments.description: Gain 8% critical strike chance.

augments.name: Fleetfoot
augments.description: Move 15% faster. Run them down — or run away.

augments.name: Ironhide
augments.description: Gain 250 armor and 5% dodge.

augments.name: Mending
augments.description: Your healing is 20% more potent.

augments.name: Warlord's Might
augments.description: +25% physical damage and +10% crit. Become the threat.

augments.name: Arcane Surge
augments.description: +25% spell damage and +10% crit. Light them up.

augments.name: Vampirism
augments.description: Heal for 15% of all damage you deal. Sustain through chaos.

augments.name: Juggernaut
augments.description: +20% maximum health and +400 armor. Immovable.

augments.name: Bloodhunter
augments.description: +18% damage of all kinds and +12% move speed.

augments.name: Lightwell
augments.description: +30% healing and +15% maximum health. Anchor your team.

augments.name: Bounty Hunter
augments.description: Your kills are worth +1 bonus team point. Close the gap fast.

augments.name: Apex Predator
augments.description: +40% physical damage, +15% crit, heal for 12% of damage dealt.

augments.name: Archmage
augments.description: +45% spell damage, +15% crit, +15% maximum health.

augments.name: Unkillable
augments.description: +40% maximum health, +600 armor, heal for 10% of damage dealt.

augments.name: Overdrive
augments.description: +30% all damage, +20% crit, +20% move speed. FIESTA!

augments.name: Avatar of War
augments.description: +25% all damage, +25% maximum health, +300 armor. Walk it down.

augments.name: Ascendant
